data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for walk-up QR booking, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, the prior evidence does not include any details or confirmations regarding the functionality of scanning to see availability and booking on the spot. This lack of evidence indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement, as the necessary functionality has not been demonstrated or validated.
gaps: No evidence of walk-up QR booking functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
